import json, os, sys

data = json.load(open(p, "r", encoding="utf-8"))
len(data)
data[0]

snippet = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
matches = [d for d in data if snippet in d['ayah_text']]
len(matches)

import re
# normalization function
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""
                             ّ    | # Shadda
                             َ    | # Fatha
                             ً    | # Tanwin Fath
                             ُ    | # Damma
                             ٌ    | # Tanwin Damm
                             ِ    | # Kasra
                             ٍ    | # Tanwin Kasr
                             ْ    | # Sukun
                             ٰ    | # dagger alif
                             ٱ    | # wasla/hamzat wasl
                             """, re.VERBOSE)
def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tatweel
    text = re.sub('[ـ]', '', text)
    # remove diacritics
    text = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', text)
    # unify hamza variants: treat أإآا as ا
    text = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', text)
    # unify hamza on ya: ئءؤ to ا? better to map ؤ to و, ئ to ي, ء to ا? 
    text = re.sub('ؤ','و', text)
    text = re.sub('ئ','ي', text)
    text = re.sub('ء','', text)
    # remove punctuation
    text = re.sub('[\u0600-\u06FF]', lambda m: m.group(0), text)  # keep arabic
    # remove non-Arabic
    text = re.sub('[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', '', text)
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub('\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # to lower? Arabic has no case
    return text

normalized_snip = normalize_ar(snippet)
normalized_snip

# build normalized index
for d in data[:5]:
    print(d['ayah_text'], '->', normalize_ar(d['ayah_text']))
# create normalized mapping
norms = [normalize_ar(d['ayah_text']) for d in data]
# search substring
candidates = [d for d, n in zip(data, norms) if normalized_snip in n]
len(candidates)

[c for c in data if normalize_ar(c['ayah_text']).find(norm_search)!=-1][:10], sum(1 for c in data if normalize_ar(c['ayah_text']).find(norm_search)!=-1)
[w for w in data if 'وَعَدَ' in w['ayah_text']][:20], sum(1 for w in data if 'وَعَدَ' in w['ayah_text'])

from difflib import SequenceMatcher
def seq_ratio(a,b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()

norm_snip = normalize_ar("وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ")
# compute top 20 similarity among quranic verses
scores = []
for d in data:
    n = normalize_ar(d['ayah_text'])
    r = seq_ratio(norm_snip, n)
    scores.append((r, d))
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
scores_sorted[:20]

scores_h = []
for h in hdata:
    full = (h.get('hadithTxt') or "") + " " + (h.get('Matn') or "")
    n = normalize_ar(full)
    r = seq_ratio(norm_snip, n)
    scores_h.append((r, h))
scores_h_sorted = sorted(scores_h, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
scores_h_sorted[:20]
